Summary: EPIC-01 Platform Hardening
Description: Stabilize migrations, observability, and release safety before monetization rollout.

Summary: SP1-01 Add migration framework and schema versioning
Description: Implement migration runner, baseline schema version table, and rollback command.

Summary: SP1-02 Add auth/stocks/webhook smoke tests
Description: Add smoke tests for session auth, stocks endpoint, and payment webhook signature flow.

Summary: SP1-03 Add API and webhook monitoring
Description: Create dashboards and alerts for API 5xx, webhook failures, and latency thresholds.

Summary: SP1-04 Freeze event taxonomy and billing status enum
Description: Define canonical event names, categories, and billing status transitions.

Summary: SP1-05 Release checklist and rollback runbook
Description: Document pre-release checks, rollback triggers, and incident response steps.

Summary: EPIC-02 Billing Ledger Core
Description: Create auditable subscription and transaction lifecycle before strict paywall activation.

Summary: SP2-01 Create subscriptions collection and indexes
Description: Create subscriptions schema, status lifecycle fields, and operational indexes.

Summary: SP2-02 Create payment_transactions with idempotency
Description: Store provider order lifecycle and enforce idempotency by order and provider transaction id.

Summary: SP2-03 Persist pending transaction at checkout start
Description: Write pending transaction record when checkout token is created.

Summary: SP2-04 Webhook updates transaction before plan upgrade
Description: Update transaction status first, then apply plan change only for paid states.

Summary: SP2-05 Add plan_change_history
Description: Record immutable plan transitions with reason, actor, and timestamp.

Summary: SP2-06 Add billing admin read endpoints
Description: Provide internal endpoints for pending, failed, settled transactions with filters.

Summary: EPIC-03 Product Analytics Instrumentation
Description: Capture event and session telemetry for conversion and retention analysis.

Summary: SP3-01 Add event ingestion endpoint with validation
Description: Create ingestion API with schema validation and dead-letter handling.

Summary: SP3-02 Add client tracking wrapper for core events
Description: Implement reusable client tracker and emit core journey events.

Summary: SP3-03 Add server-side payment outcome events
Description: Emit payment_succeeded and payment_failed from backend lifecycle events.

Summary: SP3-04 Add sessions model and identity stitching
Description: Persist sessions and merge anonymous to authenticated identity after login.

Summary: SP3-05 Build daily funnel aggregation job
Description: Aggregate visit, upgrade click, checkout, and paid funnel per day and segment.

Summary: EPIC-04 User-Owned Data Features
Description: Implement watchlists, saved screeners, and alerts to increase product stickiness.

Summary: SP4-01 Implement watchlists and watchlist_items APIs
Description: Create CRUD APIs and data model for watchlists and items.

Summary: SP4-02 Implement saved_screeners APIs
Description: Create CRUD APIs for user saved filter presets and sorting preferences.

Summary: SP4-03 Wire watchlist UI to persisted APIs
Description: Replace placeholder watchlist UI with real create/add/remove interactions.

Summary: SP4-04 Implement first alert type price threshold
Description: Support price_above and price_below alerts and trigger history records.

Summary: SP4-05 Persist profile preferences
Description: Store and load locale and notification preferences per user.

Summary: EPIC-05 Research Data Pipeline
Description: Build reliable historical datasets and quality lineage for data product monetization.

Summary: SP5-01 Split master and daily fact datasets
Description: Create stocks_master, stocks_market_daily, and stocks_governance_daily structures.

Summary: SP5-02 Add ownership snapshot pipeline
Description: Generate daily ownership snapshots and concentration metrics by symbol.

Summary: SP5-03 Persist ai_scores_daily with model versioning
Description: Store score history with model and feature-set version metadata.

Summary: SP5-04 Add data lineage and quality snapshots
Description: Track freshness, null rates, row counts, and checksums per dataset run.

Summary: SP5-05 Run 6-12 month historical backfill
Description: Backfill historical data and produce validation report by dataset.

Summary: EPIC-06 API Monetization and Metering
Description: Monetize data access with API keys, quota controls, and usage reporting.

Summary: SP6-01 Implement api_keys with secure hashing
Description: Create API key issuance and revocation flow with hashed storage.

Summary: SP6-02 Build api_usage_hourly metering
Description: Aggregate request count, row count, errors, and latency per key/endpoint/hour.

Summary: SP6-03 Add rate limit and monthly quota enforcement
Description: Apply middleware limits by plan and expose quota response headers.

Summary: SP6-04 Productize API packages by plan scope
Description: Define and enforce endpoint package scopes for core, enriched, and historical data.

Summary: SP6-05 Add usage dashboard and billing export
Description: Provide internal dashboard and CSV export for invoice-ready usage.

Summary: EPIC-07 Paywall Activation and Growth
Description: Enable plan gating and run conversion optimization safely.

Summary: SP7-01 Re-enable backend free-tier limits
Description: Apply server-side plan checks and enforce data access caps by plan.

Summary: SP7-02 Re-enable frontend premium tab gating
Description: Restore client plan gating and upgrade prompts for premium-only surfaces.

Summary: SP7-03 Add pricing and CTA experiments
Description: Ship experiment variants for upgrade CTA and pricing communication.

Summary: SP7-04 Add cancellation and churn feedback flow
Description: Capture cancellation reasons and emit churn feedback events.

Summary: SP7-05 Run 7-day hypercare monitoring
Description: Track launch health metrics and incident responses after paywall activation.
